creator: martin@waschbuesch.de
text:
Created attachment 162021
patch to enable ActiveSync

I updated the patch so it provides an option to enable ActiveSync.
I also made the corresponding files in pkg-plist install only when the option is selected.

Note: I had to resort to using @${REINPLACE_CMD} in order to have the main GNUmakefile adhere to (de)selecting ActiveSync. It seems crude, so maybe there is a more elegant way I am unaware of?
